caption: A screen recording shows a webpage for a "List Randomizer" from RANDOM.ORG. The page displays a randomized list of ten names, including "1. Ron Wester" and "2. Ron Wester," alongside technical details such as "IP: 47.152.121.66" and "Timestamp: 2023-11-23 03:23:44 UTC." An advisory notice at the top states, "Advisory: we only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." A chat window on the right contains messages from "nightbot" and "elegant," with elegant stating, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can." Nightbot provides a link for "the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE!" A banner at the bottom features the "CASEBREAKS.COM" logo. Across the frames, the visual content remains static, showing no movement or changes to the text, layout, or images on the screen.
